items.blinded_text: The Election A A will be held on relative-date-1 , to elect the mayor of City A, California. If no candidate receives a majority of the vote, a runoff Election A will be held on relative-date-2 . This market will resolve according to the listed pair of candidates that advance to the second round of the Election A A. If any candidate wins this Election A outright in the first round, this market will resolve to [identifying quotation removed]. If any candidate pair other than the listed pairs advances to the second round of the Election A A, this market will resolve to “Other”. If the results of the first round of the Election A A are not known by relative-date-3 , specified-time ET, this market will resolve to "Other". This market will resolve based on the results of this Election A as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the city and county of City A.

question: Will Candidate A & Candidate B advance to the second round of the Election A A?
